title: panicum hordeaceum
intro: Panicum hordeaceum, also known as wild barley or cheat grass, is a type of grass native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Panicum hordeaceum include treating digestive issues, sore throats, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from fever and other symptoms. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in salves and ointments to aid in wound healing and skin care.
